title: corunastylis pumila
intro: Corunastylis pumila, also known as the Dwarf Greenhood, is a species of orchid native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Corunastylis pumila are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
